operational_knowledge_units.title: System Detail screen serves as the home screen for overview and navigation
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The System Detail screen is described as the home screen for system overview and navigation. It provides access to subscreens, displays layout/status areas, and includes system control and information functions.
observed_evidence: “Purpose: Home screen for system overview and navigation”
“Main Menu: Navigate subscreens – Detail, Statistics, HMI Calculations, API, RMS”
“System Layout: Shows Sorter, Tippers, Hospital, GLDS, CS Estops and AGV Errors”
“Controls & Info: Start/Stop system, Bag Out, Purge, view Metrics (Destinations), AGV status, Tote”

relationships.target: Detail, Statistics, HMI Calculations, API, RMS

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: System Detail is the home screen for system overview and navigation. It includes a Main Menu for Detail, Statistics, HMI Calculations, API, and RMS; a System Layout showing Sorter, Tippers, Hospital, GLDS, CS Estops, and AGV Errors; and Controls & Info for Start/Stop, Bag Out, Purge, Metrics, AGV status, and Tote.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Main Menu provides navigation to operational subscreens
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Main Menu on the System Detail screen is used to navigate between subscreens including Detail, Statistics, HMI Calculations, API, and RMS.
observed_evidence: “Main Menu: Navigate subscreens – Detail, Statistics, HMI Calculations, API, RMS”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Main Menu navigation on the System Detail screen includes Detail, Statistics, HMI Calculations, API, and RMS subscreens.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Subscreen refresh workaround uses the ACB1 – AMR TT selection
operational_knowledge_units.summary: If a subscreen does not update, the slide gives a tip to click “ACB1 – AMR TT” as a refresh or update workaround.
observed_evidence: “Tip: Click ‘ACB1 – AMR TT’ if a subscreen does not update”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: When a subscreen does not update on the HMI, the slide advises clicking “ACB1 – AMR TT” as a workaround.

operational_knowledge_units.title: System Layout shows major equipment and alert areas
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The System Layout area visually presents key equipment and alert categories including Sorter, Tippers, Hospital, GLDS, CS Estops, and AGV Errors.
observed_evidence: “System Layout: Shows Sorter, Tippers, Hospital, GLDS, CS Estops and AGV Errors”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: The System Layout section shows Sorter, Tippers, Hospital, GLDS, CS Estops, and AGV Errors on the System Detail screen.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Layout icons can be clicked for more information on selected components
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide indicates that icons in the layout can be selected to access more information for Tippers, Hospitals, and GLDS.
observed_evidence: “Click icons for more info on Tippers/Hospitals/GLDS”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: On the System Detail layout, clicking icons provides more information for Tippers, Hospitals, and GLDS.

operational_knowledge_units.title: Controls & Info section includes system control and status functions
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The Controls & Info area includes actions and information displays for system start/stop, Bag Out, Purge, destination metrics, AGV status, and Tote-related information.
observed_evidence: “Controls & Info: Start/Stop system, Bag Out, Purge, view Metrics (Destinations), AGV status, Tote”
operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Controls & Info on the System Detail screen includes Start/Stop system, Bag Out, Purge, Metrics (Destinations), AGV status, and Tote information.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Navigate to additional information for Tippers, Hospitals, or GLDS from System Detail
preconditions: User is on the System Detail screen.
Relevant icons for Tippers, Hospitals, or GLDS are visible in the System Layout area.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide describes the System Detail home screen and states that icons in the System Layout can be clicked for more information on Tippers, Hospitals, and GLDS.

steps.instruction: Open or remain on the System Detail screen.
steps.expected_outcome: The home screen for system overview and navigation is displayed.
steps.validation_check: Confirm the screen corresponds to System Detail / Overall System.

steps.instruction: In the System Layout area, click the icon for the desired Tipper, Hospital, or GLDS item.
steps.expected_outcome: More information for the selected Tipper, Hospital, or GLDS item is shown.
steps.validation_check: Confirm that additional information opens or updates for the selected icon.
steps.visual_region_hint: System Layout icons for Tippers / Hospitals / GLDS

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: From the System Detail screen, click icons in the System Layout to view more information on Tippers, Hospitals, or GLDS.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: Refresh a subscreen by clicking ACB1 – AMR TT when the subscreen does not update
preconditions: A subscreen is open or being viewed.
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Slide includes a tip stating to click “ACB1 – AMR TT” if a subscreen does not update.

steps.instruction: If a subscreen does not update, click “ACB1 – AMR TT.”
steps.expected_outcome: The subscreen may refresh or begin updating.
steps.validation_check: Confirm whether the previously non-updating subscreen now updates.
steps.visual_region_hint: UI element labeled ACB1 – AMR TT on the System Detail / subscreen navigation area

procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: If a subscreen does not update, click “ACB1 – AMR TT” as a refresh workaround.
